arts.ttl: Man Utd Set to Rival West Ham for PSG’s £60M-Rated Summer Target
arts.sum: As the summer transfer window closed, Paris Saint-Germain showed interest in Atalanta forward Ademola Lookman, and recent reports suggest they might reignite their pursuit in January. However, they could face stiff competition for his signature. PSG’s struggles in front of goal have highlighted the need for attacking reinforcements. arts.sum: FC Barcelona, Liverpool, and Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly among the clubs showing interest in Napoli’s Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. Reports that contract extension talks between the player and Napoli are stalling have encouraged these teams.
